reasoning: Emotional (60%): The boss key reads warmly — saturated gold/orange shaft with small blue gem accents conveys 'special treasure' charm fitting bright Hyrule mood. Rounded bow and decorative bit add toy-diorama quality. Emotional score ~7/10. Technical (40%): 1px hard outlines visible in dark brown/black; 2-3 tone hard shading on shaft (orange → gold → highlight); pixels grid-snapped with no anti-aliasing; hand-pixeled construction evident across all zoom panels. Passes technical axis cleanly. Technical score ~8/10. Reference note: provided Denzi reference sheet shows gray metallic helmets — different item category, limiting direct comparison, but confirms hard-outline/limited-palette standard which the candidate meets. Combined: 0.6×7 + 0.4×8 = 7.4, rounded to 7, verdict marginal.
